text: Hello. Yes. Hello. Good afternoon. This is Evelyn. So I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Nevada State Relief Program. So far, have you received any updates or notifications about this yet? Ma'am, I do not have Medicare, I get all my medicals through my job, but thank you very much for calling. Goodbye.
